title: Flodesk vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Flodesk vs Constant Contact: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
h1: Flodesk vs Constant Contact: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Flodesk and Constant Contact comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Flodesk is built for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Constant Contact targets nonprofits and local businesses. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses

faq.q: Is Flodesk better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Flodesk wins for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Constant Contact is stronger for nonprofits and local businesses. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at a lower price point ($12/mo vs $38/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Constant Contact to Flodesk is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
